Economics Principles

Economics helps explain how markets operate and how agents make choices with limited resources.

Example Applications

  • Review how supply and demand set equilibrium prices.
  • Study opportunity cost when evaluating business decisions.
  • Use elasticity to project the impact of pricing changes.
